sources_used.title: What is the Moon Made Of? (Hint: It’s Not Cheese) - Universe Today
Why Do People Say the Moon is Made of Cheese? - Mental Floss

ollama_response:
Verdict: The moon is not made of cheese.

Explanation: Two sources, Universe Today and Mental Floss, both published in 2023 and 2025 respectively, confirm that the moon is not composed of cheese. Universe Today provides an explanation about what the moon is actually made of, while Mental Floss discusses the origin of the misconception that the moon is made of cheese.

Confidence: High

Conflicting Sources: None
